constraints.description: 兼容现有系统：必须保持现有 /openflow-issue、/openflow-verify、/openflow-archive 的命令兼容
constraints.rationale: This free-text constraint was provided directly during brainstorming and should be preserved
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the implementation against the exact stated constraint during design and testing

constraints.description: 但在 issue flow 中允许 /openflow-issue 内置 evidence/readiness 判断
constraints.rationale: This free-text constraint was provided directly during brainstorming and should be preserved
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the implementation against the exact stated constraint during design and testing

constraints.description: archive 必须支持没有 design.md 的 issue workspace
constraints.rationale: This free-text constraint was provided directly during brainstorming and should be preserved
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the implementation against the exact stated constraint during design and testing

constraints.description: 不能强制要求 changes feature 设计文档。
constraints.rationale: This free-text constraint was provided directly during brainstorming and should be preserved
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the implementation against the exact stated constraint during design and testing

inScope: openflow-issue workflow：这是对现有 /openflow-issue 流程的重塑。它需要在“分析问题”和“动手修复问题”之间做意图路由；修复完成后要内置 evidence/readiness 判断，生成 issue-resolution.md / promotion-candidate.md，并允许后续直接进入 issue archive，而不是强制走 feature design docs。

Address the stated problem: [search-mode]
MAXIMIZE SEARCH EFFORT. Launch multiple background agents IN PARALLEL:
- explore agents (codebase patterns, file structures, ast-grep)
- librarian agents (remote repos, official docs, GitHub examples)
Plus direct tools: Grep, ripgrep (rg), ast-grep (sg)
NEVER stop at first result - be exhaustive.

[analyze-mode]
ANALYSIS MODE. Gather context before diving deep:
CONTEXT GATHERING (parallel):
- 1-2 explore agents (codebase patterns, implementations)
- 1-2 librarian agents (if external library involved)
- Direct tools: Grep, AST-grep, LSP for targeted searches

IF COMPLEX - DO NOT STRUGGLE ALONE. Consult specialists:
- **Oracle**: Conventional problems (architecture, debugging, complex logic)
- **Artistry**: Non-conventional problems (different approach needed)

SYNTHESIZE findings before proceeding.
---
MANDATORY delegate_task params: ALWAYS include load_skills=[] and run_in_background when calling delegate_task.
Example: delegate_task(subagent_type="explore", prompt="...", run_in_background=true, load_skills=[])

---

我认为 "/openflow-issue" 是用来修复问题或者分析问题的。 开发者应该有能力辨识到使用brainstor 还是使用issue。  
但是 issue 确实要做一个路由，要做一个意图判断，有的时候是查询代码，有的时候是动手解决问题。
之前的流程是issue -> Verify -> archive 。
但我现在想把verify 内嵌到issue, 或者直接去除verify。 后续调用归档命令就可以了。但是这个时候的归档又没有changes feature 所以流程到这里就卡住了。
